mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, user_id, game_id, content, score, create_time, deleted FROM t_game_comment WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_game_comment WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT AVG(score) FROM t_game_comment WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND deleted = 0
